title: Kyrio 4 PCS Luggage Straps for Suitcases, Heavy Duty Luggage Straps, Adjustable Luggage Strap for Travel Bag Luggage（Light Blue, Fluorescent Green, Yellow, Enamel Red）
features: Premium Material: kyrio luggage straps are meticulously crafted from high-quality polypropylene, Durable and Portable.
Bright Colors: the luggage belt is available in 4 colors for you to choose: light blue, fluorescent green, yellow and red, with bright colors for quick identification of your luggage.
Easy to carry: 4 luggage straps suitable for both solo and group travelers. It ensures that your luggage is securely tied down and reduces unnecessary inconvenience during the journey.
Adjustable Length: the total length of the strap is approximately 200 cm and the width is 5 cm. With the adjustable design, you can adjust the length to suit your needs and secure your luggage.
Versatile Applications: suitable for all kinds of suitcases and luggage. Whether you are on a business trip or holiday, it is a must-have accessory for your travels.
description: Kyrio 4 Pcs Luggage Strap Set, 4 colours for you to choose from, bright colours, so you can find your luggage quickly, a great accessory for travelling. Material: polypropylene Maximum length: about 200cm Width: 5cm Color: light blue, fluorescent green, yellow, enamel red Weight:339.5g Product list: 1x light blue luggage strap 1x fluorescent green luggage strap 1x yellow luggage strap 1x enamel red luggage strap
